entity.label: Melchi
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Addi, and father of Neri (Luke 3:28).

nodes.label: Melchi
nodes.description: The son of Addi, and father of Neri (Luke 3:28).

nodes.label: Addi
nodes.description: Ornament, (Luke 3:28), the son of Cosam, and father of Melchi, one of the progenitors of Christ.

verses.text: Which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Addi, which was the son of Cosam, which was the son of Elmodam, which was the son of Er,
